mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order`(order_no, user_id, store_id, total_fen, pay_type, status, pay_time, cancel_time, remark, prepay_requested, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{totalFen}, #{payType}, #{status}, #{payTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{remark}, #{prepayRequested}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{targetStatus}, pay_time = CASE WHEN #{targetStatus} = 'PAID' THEN #{eventTime} ELSE pay_time END, cancel_time = CASE WHEN #{targetStatus} = 'CANCELLED' THEN #{eventTime} ELSE cancel_time END, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `order` SET prepay_requested = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 'CREATED' AND deleted = 0
